title: Crash Bandicoot N. Sane Trilogy Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Vicarious Visions' remaster rebuilds the first three Crash games with modern visuals while preserving the series' linear gauntlet levels, spin attacks, and wumpa-collecting precision platforming.
narrative.core_loop: Spin and jump through linear stages, break crates for wumpa and lives, defeat Cortex's minions, and clear boss gates to advance.

mechanics.map_notes: Three Crash Bandicoot games remastered in one package.
mechanics.expression: Three Crash Bandicoot games remastered in one package.

mechanics.map_notes: Spin attack destroys enemies and breaks crate clusters.
mechanics.expression: Spin attack destroys enemies and breaks crate clusters.

mechanics.map_notes: Stages are forward gauntlets ending in gem or portal goals.
mechanics.expression: Stages are forward gauntlets ending in gem or portal goals.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives from wumpa fruit gate retries on death.
mechanics.expression: Lives from wumpa fruit gate retries on death.

mechanics.map_notes: Gems and crystals gate optional paths and story progress.
mechanics.expression: Gems and crystals gate optional paths and story progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Pits, logs, and chase sequences punish imprecise jumps.
mechanics.expression: Pits, logs, and chase sequences punish imprecise jumps.

mechanics.map_notes: Cortex and Ripper Roo follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Cortex and Ripper Roo follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss fights shift arenas across multiple attack phases.
mechanics.expression: Boss fights shift arenas across multiple attack phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Colored gem paths and hidden areas extend completion.
mechanics.expression: Colored gem paths and hidden areas extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Tight jumps in High Road and Slippery Climb demand exact timing.
mechanics.expression: Tight jumps in High Road and Slippery Climb demand exact timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Hit from enemy or hazard costs a life unless Aku Aku shields.
mechanics.expression: Hit from enemy or hazard costs a life unless Aku Aku shields.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Crash Bandicoot N. Sane Trilogy through its core platformer loop.
